creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
I have a FreeBSD desktop running 14.1p5 and with LibreOffice "libreoffice-24.8.0.3" installed.  When I launch it:

[1:1:301]dgilbert@strike:~> libreoffice 
Unspecified Application Error

glxgears appears to work fine (I say this in response to many posts I've read on the subject).
